children.label: a
children.text: that the State agency is not complying substantially with the provisions required by to be included in its State plan; orsection 291d of this title

children.label: b
children.text: that any assurance required to be given in an application filed under is not being or cannot be carried out; orsection 291e of this title

children.label: c
children.text: that there is a substantial failure to carry out plans and specifications approved by the Surgeon General under ; orsection 291e of this title

children.label: d
children.text: that adequate State funds are not being provided annually for the direct administration of the State plan,

children.label: e
children.text: no further payments will be made to the State under this part, or

children.label: f
children.text: no further payments will be made from the allotments of such State from appropriations under any one or more subparagraphs or paragraphs of , or for any project or projects, designated by the Surgeon General as being affected by the action or inaction referred to in paragraph (a), (b), (c), or (d) of this section,section 291a of this title
